g.text: Figure 3. Temporal rewiring across stroke transitions

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Times New Roman', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Red = coupling enhancement, blue = weakening (pooled q < 0.05)
